no: Forgotten Armament by morpheus562. Item additions (GROUP @3006) install in ITEM ADDITION MODS. Item tweaks (GROUP @3007) install in PRE-TACTICAL TWEAKS. 6 components FORBID Item Revisions main (cn:0) — auto-skip if IR main is installed.

conflicts.reason: 6 FA components use REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED setup-item_rev.tp2 cn:0 — auto-skip if IR main installed. FA cn:26 (Armor Overhaul) also checks IR cn:1040/1042. IR main (cn:0) (only cn:1060/1070 standalone tweaks), so all FA components install fine. No conflict in current preset. cn:10 (NWN2 Weapons) has NO IR check — always safe. Hard conflict only if IR main (cn:0) is selected.
conflicts.myComps: #4 Stat Items #19 Nerf APR #21 Update Existing #23 #24 Crit Immunity #25 Set Bonuses #26 Armor Overhaul
conflicts.source: FA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED on cn:4/19/21/23/24/25; cn:26 checks IR 1040/1042; cn:10 no IR check, 2026-04

sum: Adds new weapons, armor, and magical items across BG1 and BG2. Items are placed in logical locations with merchant integration.

co.n: Add New Items to the Game
co.tp2n: Add New Items to the Game
co.no: Core item additions. Adds new items to BG1/BG2 shops and treasure. No conflicts.

HARD CONFLICT: FORBID Item Revisions cn:0. Auto-skips if IR is installed. Updates existing item stats. INSTALLS WITH WARNINGS (non-fatal): 'no effects added to SW1H69.ITM' (3x) — sword effect slots don't match expected structure.

co.n: Add Breach Scrolls to Sorcerous Sundries
co.tp2n: Add Breach Scrolls to Sorcerous Sundries
co.no: Adds Breach scrolls to Sorcerous Sundries. Requires bgee or eet (not bg2ee standalone).

co.n: Add Ruby Ray Scrolls to Trademeet Store
co.tp2n: Add Ruby Ray Scrolls to Trademeet Store
co.no: Adds Ruby Ray scrolls to Trademeet store. BG2EE/EET only.

co.n: Add Freedom Scrolls to Ribald's Store (Pre-Underdark)
co.tp2n: Add Freedom Scrolls to Ribald's Store (Pre-Underdark)
co.no: Adds Freedom scrolls to Ribald's store (pre-Underdark). BG2EE/EET only.

co.tp2n: Add more Items and Scrolls to Orrick's Store
co.no: IWD:EE only — REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS ~iwdee~. Auto-skipped in EET (game type is 'eet', not 'iwdee'). Would need upstream change to GAME_IS ~iwdee eet~ plus IWD store detection to work with IWD-in-EET mods.

co.tp2n: Add more Items to Conlan's Smithy
co.no: IWD:EE only — REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS ~iwdee~. Auto-skipped in EET. Same upstream limitation as cn:30.

co.n: Replace Boots of Speed (Paws of the Cheetah)
co.tp2n: Replace Boots of Speed (Paws of the Cheetah)
co.no: Replaces Boots of Speed with Paws of the Cheetah. Cosmetic/balance change.
Creates Potions of Acid Resistance and adds to shops.
Changes weapon proficiency names and descriptions to NWN2 style.

co.n: Update Items Setting an Ability Score to Increment the Increase
co.tp2n: Update Items Setting an Ability Score to Increment the Increase
co.no: HARD CONFLICT: FORBID Item Revisions cn:0. Changes stat-setting items (e.g. gauntlets) to use incremental bonuses instead.

co.n: Nerf APR Increasing One-Handed Melee Weapons
co.tp2n: Nerf APR Increasing One-Handed Melee Weapons
co.no: HARD CONFLICT: FORBID Item Revisions cn:0. Nerfs APR bonuses on one-handed melee weapons for balance.

co.n: Critical Hit Immunity: Remove from Difficult Enemies
co.tp2n: Remove Critical Hit Immunity from Difficult Enemies
co.no: HARD CONFLICT: FORBID Item Revisions cn:0. Removes critical hit immunity from difficult enemies. Choose one option.

co.n: Critical Hit Immunity: Allow Difficult Enemies to Remain Immune
co.tp2n: Allow Difficult Enemies to Remain Immune to Critical Hits
co.no: HARD CONFLICT: FORBID Item Revisions cn:0. Keeps critical hit immunity on difficult enemies. Choose one option.
HARD CONFLICT: FORBID Item Revisions cn:0. Adds set bonuses when wearing matching items together.
HARD CONFLICT: FORBID Item Revisions armor component. Major armor rebalance — AC values, weight, restrictions. Conflicts with YARAS and other armor overhauls.

co.scn: Update Wands to X Uses Per Day
co.no: Wands have 1 use per day (most restrictive). Choose one wand option.

co.scn: Update Wands to X Uses Per Day
co.no: Wands have 2 uses per day (balanced). Choose one wand option.

co.scn: Update Wands to X Uses Per Day
co.no: Wands have 3 uses per day (most permissive). Choose one wand option.

advisories.reason: Both may modify overlapping weapon items. Polyvorp replaces vorpal effects; FA Update Existing Items patches weapon stats. Install Polyvorp after FA.
